steps.name: Mara
steps.text: /suggest Piranesi by Susanna Clarke

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
Added Piranesi by Susanna Clarke to the list of suggestions for Fireside Book Club.

Piranesi's house is no ordinary building: its rooms are infinite, its corridors endless, its walls are lined with thousands upon thousands of statues…

Say /remove to undo.

steps.name: Jay
steps.text: /suggest Babel by RF Kuang

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
Added Babel by RF Kuang to the list of suggestions for Fireside Book Club.

Traduttore, traditore: An act of translation is always an act of betrayal. Robin Swift trains at Oxford's Royal Institute of Translation — also known as Babel…

Say /remove to undo.

steps.name: Melanie
steps.text: /suggest Caliban and the Witch by Silvia Federici

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
Added Caliban and the Witch by Silvia Federici to the list of suggestions for Fireside Book Club.

A history of the body in the transition to capitalism. Moving from the peasant revolts of the late Middle Ages to the witch-hunts and the rise of mechanical philosophy…

Say /remove to undo.

steps.name: Melanie
steps.text: /suggestions

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
Current suggestions:

1. Piranesi — Susanna Clarke (Mara)
2. Babel — RF Kuang (Jay)
3. Caliban and the Witch — Silvia Federici (Melanie)

steps.name: Stephanie
steps.text: /start vote 2

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
3 books — pick up to 2:

1. Piranesi — Susanna Clarke
Piranesi's house is no ordinary building: its rooms are infinite, its corridors endless, its walls are lined with thousands upon thousands of statues…

2. Babel — RF Kuang
Traduttore, traditore: An act of translation is always an act of betrayal. Robin Swift trains at Oxford's Royal Institute of Translation — also known as Babel…

3. Caliban and the Witch — Silvia Federici
A history of the body in the transition to capitalism. Moving from the peasant revolts of the late Middle Ages to the witch-hunts and the rise of mechanical philosophy…

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
What should we read next? (Pick 2)

☐ Piranesi
☐ Babel
☐ Caliban and the Witch

steps.text:

steps.text: /close vote

steps.name: Yonderbook Clubs
steps.text:
Vote closed!

Final results:

1. Piranesi — 4 votes
2. Caliban and the Witch — 3 votes
3. Babel — 2 votes
